title: Kaerahelbeküpsised
ingredients: Sliced almonds or chopped nuts for topping
instructions: Mix oat flakes, flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and cardamom together.
Combine plant milk, oil, and sugar separately.
Add wet mixture to dry ingredients.
Mash banana with fork and incorporate into dough.
Optional: add dark chocolate pieces (reduce sugar if doing so).
Spoon dollops onto baking sheet, flatten slightly.
Top with nuts or almond slices.
Bake until golden brown.
notes: Use varying oat textures for more interesting texture. Try frozen berries or chocolate chips inside for variation.
description: Ühed maitsvaimad küpsised! Valmivad kiirelt ja vähestest koostisosadest! Tee topeltkogus, sest need seisavad hästi ja neid on hea kiireks näksimiseks kaasa võtta.
descriptionEn: Some of the tastiest cookies you'll make! Quick to prepare with just a few ingredients. Make a double batch — they store well and are perfect for snacking on the go.

title: Banaanimuffinid
ingredients: 100g wheat flour or gluten-free flour blend
Optional toppings: almond slices, chopped nuts, chocolate pieces, berries
instructions: Prepare muffin pan with plant-based oil.
Mix flaxseed and psyllium with warm milk; let sit.
Combine baking powder, baking soda, and vinegar with yogurt; let sit.
Whisk chickpea liquid into stiff peaks.
Mix flours, salt, and cardamom; mash bananas and add with oil, sugar, honey.
Fold in milk and yogurt mixtures.
Gently fold in whipped chickpea liquid.
Fill muffin cups halfway, add optional fillings, top with remaining batter.
Sprinkle with nuts or almond flakes.
Bake at 180°C for 30–40 minutes until golden; optionally dust with powdered sugar.
notes: Best served warm but tasty the next day. Customize with various berries, nuts, or chocolate.
description: Muffinid, mida saad täiendada vastavalt oma soovile mustikate, vaarikate, pähklite või šokolaadiga. Hõrgult muredad ja kehale leebed.
descriptionEn: Customisable muffins you can enhance with blueberries, raspberries, nuts, or chocolate. Delightfully crumbly and gentle on the body.

title: Šokolaadikook
ingredients: 250g wheat flour or gluten-free flour blend
instructions: Mix ground flaxseed with water and allow to sit until thickened.
Combine all dry ingredients, then add oil and melted chocolate.
Incorporate remaining components.
Fold in the prepared flaxseed mixture until batter reaches uniform consistency.
Pour into parchment-lined baking form.
Bake approximately 40 minutes at 180°C.
Serve with cherry compote and whipped cream.
notes: Can be sliced into 2–3 layers for a torte with filling. Works with hazelnut spread filling with chocolate glaze, or whipped cream with berries and chocolate shavings.
description: Šokolaadikook, mida saad täiendada ja serveerida ka tordina. Klassikalised maitsed, millega ei saa eksida!
descriptionEn: A chocolate cake you can customise and serve as a layered torte. Classic flavours that are impossible to get wrong!

title: Polentakeeks
ingredients: Zest of 1 large or 2 small lemons
Maple syrup mixed with fresh lemon juice for soaking (optional)
instructions: Combine all dry ingredients until uniform.
Add room-temperature liquids, oil, and remaining ingredients; mix until smooth.
Pour into parchment-lined or greased pan.
Optionally fold frozen berries into batter or top with them.
Bake at 180°C until golden.
Optional: drizzle cooled cake with maple syrup-lemon juice mixture.
notes: This cake works well as a substitute for sponge cake in layered desserts — adjust pan size and double the recipe if needed.
description: Päikesekeeks! Mure ja suussulav maisipolentakeeks kaob laualt kiiresti. Täidiseks võid lisada mustikaid või kirsse.
descriptionEn: A sunny cake! This tender, melt-in-your-mouth cornmeal polenta cake disappears from the table fast. Add blueberries or cherries for extra flair.

title: Vahvlid
instructions: Combine flours, sugar, and salt in a bowl.
Add plant milk and melted coconut oil; mix thoroughly.
Whip chickpea brine into stiff peaks and fold into batter.
Cook in waffle iron until golden.
notes: Serve with jam, ice cream, honey, maple syrup, and berries. Create a waffle cake by stacking layers with peanut butter or chocolate spread.
description: Krõbedad vahvlid sobivad hästi nädalavahetuse hommikutesse või külaliste võõrustamiseks. Serveeri moosi ja jäätise, vedela mee või vahtrasiirupi ja halvaaga.
descriptionEn: Crispy waffles perfect for weekend breakfasts or entertaining guests. Serve with jam and ice cream, liquid honey, or maple syrup and halvah.

title: Napoleoni kook
instructions: Mix flour with cold butter pieces, add salt and liquids. Form into a ball and refrigerate for 1.5 hours.
Divide dough into 6 portions and roll each as thinly as possible between parchment paper.
Pierce with fork to prevent excess rising. Bake at 220°C for ~7 minutes until brown and crispy.
For cream: mix cornstarch with water. Heat milk with condensed milk until boiling, then whisk in cornstarch mixture while stirring continuously until thickened. Cool in ice bath.
Layer: use strongest pastry as base, alternate with cream filling. Top with crumbled remaining pastry layer for decoration.
Refrigerate overnight for traditional presentation, or serve immediately for contrasting textures.
notes: Refrigerate overnight for the classic soft presentation, or serve immediately for a crispy contrast.
description: Aegumatu klassika! Valmista taigen ise või kasuta poetaigent. Proovi vahelduseks serveerida kooki kohe peale selle kokkupanemist – üllatud kui maitsev see krõbe ja samas mahlane maius võib olla.
descriptionEn: A timeless classic! Make the pastry yourself or use store-bought. Try serving it immediately after assembly — you'll be surprised how delicious the crispy-yet-creamy contrast is.

title: Gluteenivaba õunakook
ingredients: 0.5 dl almond or rice flour blend with starch
instructions: Preheat oven and prepare a 24cm baking tin.
Wash and slice apples into thick slices.
Mix yogurt with baking soda, powder, and vinegar in small bowl; set aside.
Combine flaxseed flour and psyllium with water; set aside.
In large bowl, mix all dry ingredients with spices.
Mash bananas well and add with coconut oil.
Fold in both prepared mixtures; avoid overmixing.
Pour into tin and arrange apple slices on top.
Sprinkle with sugar, cinnamon, and almond flakes.
Bake at 180°C for 40–50 minutes.
notes: Pears, plums, or rhubarb work well as apple substitutes. Serve with ice cream or vanilla cream.
description: Klassikaline vanaema õunakook. Pehme ja kohev – lihtsalt suussulav! Tavapärase nisujahu asemel on siin kasutatud erinevaid jahusid.
descriptionEn: A classic grandmother's apple cake. Soft, fluffy, and simply melt-in-your-mouth! Made with a blend of flours instead of regular wheat flour.

title: Kaneelirullid ja moonirullid
ingredients: Cinnamon or poppy seeds for filling
instructions: Mix yeast with a teaspoon of water and let rest.
Sift flour into bowl; add sugar and salt. Mix in 50g melted plant butter.
Combine milk with prepared yeast; pour into flour mixture and blend until smooth dough forms.
Dust with flour, cover with cloth, place in warm location to rise until doubled (~1 hour at 30°C).
Transfer risen dough to floured surface and divide in half.
Roll one portion into a rectangle; brush with room-temperature plant butter (~20g).
Dust lightly with sugar, then generously with cinnamon (or poppy seeds).
Roll tightly from edge, keeping seam down. Slice into 2–3cm thick pieces.
Place rolls on parchment-lined baking sheet, allowing room to expand.
Let rise approximately 15 minutes; optionally brush with plant milk.
Bake at 200°C until puffed and golden-brown.
Optionally dust finished rolls with powdered sugar.
notes: The same base dough works for cardamom rolls. Cardamom complements both cinnamon and poppy seed versions.
description: Värskelt ahjust tulnud kaneelirullide lõhn võtab kõigil jalad nõrgaks. Ja ega moonirullid neile alla jää! Kõik need valmivad samast taignast.
descriptionEn: The smell of freshly baked cinnamon rolls weakens everyone's knees — and poppy seed rolls are equally irresistible! All varieties use the same dough base.

title: Kaneelirullikook
instructions: Mix yeast with a teaspoon of lukewarm water; let sit briefly.
Sift flour into bowl; add sugar and salt. Mix in half the butter (50g).
Combine milk with prepared yeast; pour into dry ingredients. Mix until smooth dough forms.
Dust with flour, cover with cloth, set in warm place to rise until doubled (~1 hour at 30°C).
Divide risen dough in half. Roll one portion into a rectangle.
Spread softened butter (~20g) and a thin sugar layer over dough.
Sprinkle cinnamon, poppy seeds, or cardamom generously.
Roll tightly from edge; slice into ~3cm pieces.
Place rolls closely together in a buttered baking pan.
Bake at 200°C until golden brown.
Dust with powdered sugar; serve with vegan cream or berries.
notes: Adjust slice quantity based on your baking pan dimensions. The difference from regular rolls is baking them tightly packed in a pan so they become a pull-apart cake.
description: Kui soovid krõbedatele kaneelirullidele vahelduseks pehmeid kaneelirulle, siis tee kaneelirullikook.
descriptionEn: If you want a softer, pull-apart alternative to crispy cinnamon rolls, this cinnamon roll cake is the answer.

title: Karamelline tofu-šokolaadikook
instructions: Crush biscuits; mix with melted butter and spices. Press into 26cm springform pan; refrigerate.
Gently melt sugar and butter in heavy pot. Add oat cream; heat until thickened. Stir in hazelnuts. Pour over base; chill.
Blend silken tofu with coconut cream and sugar. Add liqueur and vanilla. Bloom gelatin in water; melt gently. Whisk melted gelatin into tofu mixture. Pour as third layer; refrigerate until set.
Melt chocolate; add butter, almond milk, and cocoa powder. Pour over chilled cake. Work quickly. Decorate with nuts.
Ready to serve after final layer sets (approximately 1 hour).
notes: Use the darkest chocolate available to avoid excessive sweetness. Agar-agar substitutes for gelatin. Use silken coconut cream for creamiest tofu layer.
description: Selles koogis on kõike mida üks magusasõber ihkab! Krõbe küpsisepõhi, karamelline maitsenüanss, siidine tofutäidis ja pehme šokolaadikate.
descriptionEn: This decadent dessert has everything a sweet-tooth craves: a crispy cookie base, caramel flavour notes, silky tofu filling, and a soft chocolate coating.

title: Õunastruudel
instructions: Thaw puff pastry for approximately one hour.
Roll out thawed pastry 2–3 times larger into a vertical rectangle.
Slice apples into thick pieces and arrange in two rows along the pastry's center, leaving 2cm empty at both ends.
Cut horizontal strips approximately 3cm wide along pastry edges beside the filling.
Fold top pastry edge over apples, then alternately fold side strips over the filling from right and left.
Cover the bottom end with pastry before folding final strips. Transfer to parchment-lined baking sheet.
Optionally brush with plant milk and sprinkle almond flakes.
Bake at 200°C for approximately 15 minutes until golden brown.
Serve with ice cream or vanilla sauce.
notes: Use tart apples for best flavor; add lemon juice if apples are sweeter. Classic puff pastry yields crispier results.
description: See lihtne õunastruudel valmib kui võluväel! Sobib pühapäevaseks brunchiks ning alati kui vajad kiiret lahendust magusaisu kustutamiseks.
descriptionEn: This apple strudel comes together like magic! Perfect for a Sunday brunch or whenever you need a quick fix for a sweet craving or to impress guests.
